程序包 controller.Impl

类 ImportControllerImpl

java.lang.Object
controller.Impl.ImportControllerImpl
public class ImportControllerImpl extends Object
CSV import/export controller for handling financial data reading, writing, and AI classification.
从以下版本开始:
v1.0.0

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    ImportControllerImpl(UserControllerImpl userController)
    Initializes the controller with user financial data path.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    addEntry(Entry entry)
    Appends a financial entry to the CSV file.
    void
    analyzeWithAI(DefaultTableModel model, JPanel parent)
    Uses AI to automatically classify categories for financial entries (async execution).
    void
    exportCSV(DefaultTableModel model, JPanel parent)
    Exports table data to a CSV file.
    List<Entry>
    importCSV(JPanel parent)
    Imports an external CSV file and replaces current data.
    List<Entry>
    loadEntries()
    Loads financial entries from the CSV file (skips empty/invalid lines).
    void
    rewriteCSV(List<Entry> entries)
    Writes a list of entries to the CSV file (overwrites existing content).
    void
    rewriteCSV(DefaultTableModel model)
    Writes table data to the CSV file (overwrites existing content).

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 构造器详细资料

    • ImportControllerImpl

      public ImportControllerImpl(UserControllerImpl userController)
      Initializes the controller with user financial data path.
      参数:
      userController - User controller instance for retrieving CSV file path

  • 方法详细资料

    • loadEntries

      public List<Entry> loadEntries()
      Loads financial entries from the CSV file (skips empty/invalid lines).
      返回:
      List of valid financial entries

    • addEntry

      public void addEntry(Entry entry)
      Appends a financial entry to the CSV file.
      参数:
      entry - Financial entry to append

    • importCSV

      public List<Entry> importCSV(JPanel parent)
      Imports an external CSV file and replaces current data.
      参数:
      parent - Parent component (for file selection dialog)
      返回:
      List of imported financial entries

    • exportCSV

      public void exportCSV(DefaultTableModel model, JPanel parent)
      Exports table data to a CSV file.
      参数:
      model - Table data model
      parent - Parent component (for file save dialog)

    • analyzeWithAI

      public void analyzeWithAI(DefaultTableModel model, JPanel parent)
      Uses AI to automatically classify categories for financial entries (async execution).
      参数:
      model - Table data model
      parent - Parent component (for error messages)

    • rewriteCSV

      public void rewriteCSV(DefaultTableModel model)
      Writes table data to the CSV file (overwrites existing content).
      参数:
      model - Table data model

    • rewriteCSV

      public void rewriteCSV(List<Entry> entries)
      Writes a list of entries to the CSV file (overwrites existing content).
      参数:
      entries - List of financial entries
